AND PLTF. PRESENT. ONLY DEFT. BRIAN E. HUFFMASTER IS PRESENT FOR HIMSELF. DEFT. DONALD MACLEAY NOT PRESENT. SETTLEMENT REACHED AS TO DEFT. BRIAN E. HUFFMASTER ONLY. COURT TRIAL AS TO DONALD MACLEAY ON 3/15/95 STANDS. PLTF. TO HAVE JUDGEMENT AGAINST BRIAN HUFFMASTER ONLY: POSSESSION OF PREMISES, 435 - 14TH STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH, BUT STAYED UNTIL 3/29/95 AT 5PM. WRIT CAN BE POSTED FORTHWITH. PRINCIPAL IS $6,414.40 AND COSTS PER COST BILL. IF DEFT. VACATES BY 3/29/95 AT 5PM, THE DEFT. WILL DISMISS THE CASE AGAINST BRIAN HUFFMASTER ONLY WITH PREJUDICE.

TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 03
#3 JUDGE CHOPPELAS - C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT; ALL PARTIES PRESENT; DEFT. VACATED PREMISES; COURT ORDERED MATTER OFF CALENDAR; PLTF. TO FILE AMENDED COMPLT FOR DAMAGES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUFFMASTER, BRIAN E. SUED AS HUFFMEISTER, BRIAN E. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 435 14TH STR., STAYED UNTIL MAR-30-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF. WAIVES BACK RENT, DAMAGES, COSTS & ATTY. FEES PROVIDED DEFT. VACATES PREMISES BY 5PM, 3/29/95; IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE PLTF. WILL HAVE JUDGMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $6414.40, AND COSTS PER COST BILL; (SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS).
